title: Fake hardcore hearts
description: This Minecraft Java Edition resource pack adds fake hardcore hearts. Free to download and easy to install. No Optifine required, compatible with Vanilla. Enjoy optimised resources with this free download.
body:
### ❤️ Fake Hardcore Hearts ❤️

Bring the **hardcore-style heart design** into your Minecraft Java Edition world without actually playing hardcore 💀

This resource pack replaces normal survival hearts with **hardcore hearts visually only**, keeping gameplay 100% vanilla 🟢

No OptiFine, no mods, and zero performance impact ⚡

#### ✨ Features

* ❤️ Hardcore-style hearts in any survival world
* 🧱 Works in pure Vanilla Minecraft
* 🚫 No OptiFine required
* ⚡ Lightweight & performance-friendly
